narrative:
Adams County/Oh Valley Lsd (Adams) school district has 14,509 registered voters, with 50.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.7 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -22.3% D−R vs -35.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
